message:
fix: use window-size latest for proper web terminal rendering (#91)

Switch from window-size largest to latest. With 'latest', tmux sizes
the shared window to whichever client was most recently active:
- Web tile active → window fits tile → proper rendering
- Desktop active → window fits desktop → no dots

Previous approach (largest + oversized PTY) broke web rendering because
the PTY was 200x60 but xterm.js tiles were much smaller, causing
content to appear offscreen.

Also reverts resize clamping and oversized PTY defaults since they're
no longer needed with 'latest'.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
